7.response: {"Q0":"The ratio between the rewards and the ratio between the probabilities, and the relative balance between the two ratios. If one reward is double the other, but the probability of it is not at least half, then the other reward is better (for example)."}

8.response: {"Q0":"I was more focused on the galaxies because it was more difficult to both determine which is better and have only one second to select it; visiting planets was just a matter of identifying the color and pressing the right key combination, which is easier to do because it was always the same, plus there was more time to do it."}
